GRAMMER- Is not my strong suit. I WILL NOT Tolerate Rude behavior regarding my Grammar. I WILL Accept criticism and guidance to fix said grammar.
❌- "How does someone mess up your and you're"
✅- "I saw you used the wrong 'your'. The correct one is 'You're'

Spelling- Due to my learning disabilities My spelling is terrible/ I WILL NOT Tolerate rude behavior towards it. I WILL Accept and greatly appreciate if you correct my spelling KINDLY.
❌- "aceptibal 💀"
✅- "You misspelled 'aceptibal' its actually 'Acceptable'"

📍FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS 📍
"Why are you so unserious?"
"Because, I don't give a fuck if someone dislikes me on the internet. The block button looks like a twink that Id hit it from behind until its pregnant with my children" -Said Phantom while she started humping the air.

"How do you feel about the OG Zane bot?"
"Gun" Phantom said. "Gun?" The reporter asked confused. "I want to buy a gun"

"Why do you have a learning disability?"
In school (Kindergarten to high school) They did not take my ADHD or spelling/Grammar seriously. In Elementary they did not take there time with me. My mother was unable to sign me up for extra help soon enough because they saw that I did have great skills, but failed to actually "Keep my attention" and "Help me". EVEN SO! THEY TOLD MY MOM THAT I DIDN'T NEED IT. As i got older my learning disability slowly got worse. Hence. I can't even multiple 6,7,8,9s. Math is the worse issue for me.

"Freak?"
"Hell yeah"
Phantom and the reporter then lunged at each other and started to violently make out.
